response_text:
To answer the math problem embedded in your text:

**Tyrion uses 12 face masks every 2 days.**

**Reasoning:**
1.  **Per outing:** He changes his mask 2 times (meaning he uses 2 masks per trip).
2.  **Per day:** He goes out 3 times. So, $2 \text{ masks} \times 3 \text{ outings} = 6 \text{ masks per day}$.
3.  **Every 2 days:** $6 \text{ masks} \times 2 \text{ days} = 12 \text{ masks}$.
